source_pr.title: planner: support ScalarSubQuery to display them in EXPLAIN
source_pr.body:
<!--

Thank you for contributing to TiDB!

PR Title Format:
1. pkg [, pkg2, pkg3]: what's changed
2. *: what's changed

-->

### What problem does this PR solve?
<!--

Please create an issue first to describe the problem.

There MUST be one line starting with "Issue Number:  " and 
linking the relevant issues via the "close" or "ref".

For more info, check https://pingcap.github.io/tidb-dev-guide/contribute-to-tidb/contribute-code.html#referring-to-an-issue.

-->

Issue Number: close #22076

Problem Summary:

### What is changed and how it works?

### Check List

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

- [x] Unit test
- [ ] Integration test
- [ ] Manual test (add detailed scripts or steps below)
- [ ] No code

Side effects

- [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more CPU
- [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more Memory
- [ ] Breaking backward compatibility

Documentation

- [x] Affects user behaviors
- [ ] Contains syntax changes
- [ ] Contains variable changes
- [ ] Contains experimental features
- [ ] Changes MySQL compatibility

### Release note

<!-- compatibility change, improvement, bugfix, and new feature need a release note -->

Please refer to [Release Notes Language Style Guide](https://pingcap.github.io/tidb-dev-guide/contribute-to-tidb/release-notes-style-guide.html) to write a quality release note.

```release-note
None
```

symptoms: + // We need to cut the unstable output of execution info, memory and disk.
failure_signature: + // We need to cut the unstable output of execution info, memory and disk.
root_cause_explanation: The test was flaky because it asserted an exact plan/EXPLAIN output that can vary between runs. Plan-cache/lease/background refresh can introduce timing-dependent behavior. This PR stabilizes it by: + // We need to cut the unstable output of execution info, memory and disk.
fix_pattern: + // We need to cut the unstable output of execution info, memory and disk.

evidence: evidence: + // We need to cut the unstable output of execution info, memory and disk.

files: build/BUILD.bazel, executor/executor.go, expression/expression.go, planner/core/BUILD.bazel, planner/core/casetest/physicalplantest/physical_plan_test.go, planner/core/casetest/physicalplantest/testdata/plan_suite_in.json, planner/core/casetest/physicalplantest/testdata/plan_suite_out.json, planner/core/casetest/scalarsubquery/BUILD.bazel, planner/core/casetest/scalarsubquery/cases_test.go, planner/core/casetest/scalarsubquery/main_test.go, planner/core/casetest/scalarsubquery/testdata/plan_suite_in.json, planner/core/casetest/scalarsubquery/testdata/plan_suite_out.json, planner/core/common_plans.go, planner/core/expression_rewriter.go, planner/core/flat_plan.go, planner/core/initialize.go, planner/core/scalar_subq_expression.go, planner/optimize.go, sessionctx/stmtctx/stmtctx.go, sessionctx/variable/session.go, sessionctx/variable/sysvar.go, sessionctx/variable/tidb_vars.go, util/plancodec/id.go
